title: The Meridian Door
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A woman inherits an antique shop with a mysterious door that appears in the back hallway and leads to a dying bridge-world.
long_description: Miranda Hale has spent years running her late grandmother's curiosity shop on Meridian Street, selling trinkets she does not quite understand to customers who rarely come. When a solid oak door with a brass handle appears in the back hallway where there was only a blank wall, she pretends it is not there for three weeks—until a stranger named Elias arrives asking about it. The door leads to a dying bridge-world that connects two realms, and a quiet conspiracy of gatekeepers has been waiting for someone who can choose whether the door stays open or closes forever. A gentle, low-conflict portal fantasy about grief, inheritance, and the courage to open a door you cannot see through.
